Findings.Title: Node pool over-provisioned vs measured CPU
Findings.Detail: Node pool 'systempool' Standard_D8s_v5 averaging 12% CPU; downsize to D4s_v5 saves USD 280/mo.

Findings.Title: Memory request:limit ratio < 0.5 across deployments
Findings.Detail: 47/120 deployments have requests less than half of limits.
Findings.Remediation: Tighten memory requests to match observed P95 + 20%.

Findings.Title: VPA recommender enabled
Findings.Detail: Cluster has VerticalPodAutoscaler addon installed in recommend-only mode.
